* the function must satisfy the condition of being odd, which requires that f(-x) = -f(x) for all x in the domain  
* the domain [n, n+6] must be symmetric about the origin, so n+6 = -n  
* solving for n gives n = -3, which makes the domain [-3, 3]  
* substituting n = -3 into the function and solving for m gives m = 3
